channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: La seguridad cuántica acerca a IBM y Telefónica Tech con un nuevo acuerdo de colaboración
item.description: La computación cuántica es una disciplina por la que muchas organizaciones están apostando firmemente, especialmente en el desarrollo y las garantías de una tecnología criptográficamente segura, dados los desafíos futuros a los que podrían enfrentarse.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia's RTX 5080 has dethroned AMD's RX 7900 XTX at the same price – but good luck finding one
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5080 defeats AMD's Radeon RX 7900 XTX in several games at the same price, but with scalpers involved, it could be a struggle to attain the new GPU.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Renault Group strengthens decarbonisation commitment
item.description: Renault Group is committed to taking actions that help reduce its carbon footprint. By using HP IT Asset Disposition Service, the company’s end-of-use devices are securely collected, sanitised, and restored or responsibly recycled by HP.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Bringing zero downtime to anywhere work
item.description: In a work-from-anywhere world, how can a team of so few be expected to keep doing so much for so many? The pace is unsustainable. It’s time for IT to enlist some support of its own and delegate—handing off time-consuming tasks to people and to intelligent, automated tools.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Apple Vision Pro is finding a home in healthcare
item.description: In early 2024, Ryan Broderick, a surgeon at UC San Diego Health, was commiserating with some colleagues about the profusion of screens in today’s operating rooms. Though the displays provided essential guidance for minimally invasive operations in progress, they also added complexity.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Grim memories resurface after DNA advances lead to arrest of suspect in Hawaii teen's 1977 murder
item.description: The unsolved death of a teenager in 1977 haunted students and staff at Honolulu's McKinley High School for nearly half a century.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Sinco Kelleher, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple's iPhone sales during the holiday season slipped despite a highly anticipated AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Vodafone makes 'world's first' satellite video call with a standard phone –here's why that's a big deal
item.description: Vodafone has announced that it's made one of the first satellite video calls using a standard phone – ahead of a full rollout later this year.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Larry Magid: Testing DeepSeek, the Chinese generative AI app
item.description: Based on my tests and published reports, DeepSeek not yet as advanced as its American counterparts, but it’s quite good
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: How to organize, protect and streamline your inbox with an email alias
item.description: Creating an email alias can help clean up your inbox by organizing emails based on purpose, like creating different aliases for shopping, newsletters and work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg just teased next-gen Ray-Ban smart glasses – here are 4 things I want to see
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has convinced me we’re getting next-gen Ray-Ban smart glasses this year – here are 4 things I want to see from them.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: PSN accounts will now be optional for some PlayStation games on PC, but there will be 'incentives' for users who link them
item.description: Sony has announced it will be dropping the PlayStation Network account requirement for some PC versions of its games.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Alibaba introduces Qwen 2.5-Max AI model, claims edge over DeepSeek
item.description: China’s Alibaba Group has launched an upgraded version of its Qwen 2.5 AI model, claiming it outperforms models from DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Meta, as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sourcegraph unveils AI coding agents
item.description: Looking to challenge well-established GitHub Copilot in AI-powered coding assistance, Sourcegraph has announced coding agents for code review, code migration, testing, documentation, and notification, along with an API for building custom agents. Sourcegraph made the announcement on January 29.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: This group is playing ‘Dungeons & Dragons’ to help L.A. fire victims, and you can join in
item.description: The devastating California wildfires have led to a number of benefit events, from concerts to comedy shows, with the intention to fundraise for wildfire recovery efforts. The team at Critical Role, meanwhile, is going to do what they do best: play Dungeons & Dragons.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Alibaba rolls out AI model, claiming it’s better than DeepSeek-V3
item.description: Chinese tech company Alibaba on Wednesday released a new version of its Qwen 2.5 artificial intelligence model that it claimed surpassed the highly-acclaimed DeepSeek-V3.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Zuckerberg hails Trump administration on Meta earnings call
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg on Wednesday praised President Trump’s administration and said he looks forward to “redefining” the relationship the tech giant has with governments.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Verizon brings AI suite to enterprise infrastructure customers
item.description: Verizon Business has launched AI Connect, an integrated suite of products designed to let businesses deploy generative artificial intelligence (AI) workloads at scale.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How Satya Nadella is weathering the storm of Trump’s first days
item.description: It’s going to be a long four years for Microsoft as the company tries to navigate the stormy chaos and pledges of retribution that follow wherever President Donald J. Trump’s mind wanders.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DeepSeek has called into question Big AI’s trillion-dollar assumption
item.description: Recently, Chinese startup DeepSeek created state-of-the art AI models using far less computing power and capital than anyone thought possible. It then showed its work in published research papers and by allowing its models to explain the reasoning process that led to this answer or that.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Endor Labs’ new tool helps enterprises track the AI models they use
item.description: Software supply chain security vendor Endor Labs has added another dimension to its products with Tuesday’s launch of AI Model Discovery, which will be part of its core open-source evaluation offering.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps
item.description: The report highlights the possibility of unauthorized access and control over critical systems. The post After alarming audit findings, here’s how HHS can overcome cloud security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Biggest Wi-Fi mistakes you can make on a plane
item.description: It's hard to imagine life without in-flight Wi-Fi these days – but sky-high web surfing comes with its own set of privacy concerns. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Allstate sued for allegedly tracking and selling 45M Americans' location data
item.description: Many apps unrelated to location still ask users for tracking permission, and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit seeking to end this alleged practice by Allstate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
